title: Space join flow: SpaceInvite/set accept
description:
Implement the Space join flow using SpaceInvite/set in methods/misc.rs:
- SpaceInvite/set update: set status to 'accepted' to join Space
- On accept, server adds member to Space.memberIds
- Handle: invitation expired, already member, forbidden
- Permission check: for channel chats, check 'pin' permission before showing pin UI (block at method layer, surface via error type)
- Fixture test: accept invite, error cases

Fixture file: tests/fixtures/space_invite_accept.json
close_reason: superseded by jmap-chat-tui-x2d (Space methods epic, already implemented)
